title: Thumbnail PNG Uploader App

requirements.text: Build a backend actor that accepts a single PNG file upload (as binary blob), stores it with a unique ID and timestamp, and exposes query/update functions to upload, retrieve, and delete a stored thumbnail.
acceptanceCriteria: Actor exposes an upload function accepting a Blob and filename, returning a unique thumbnail ID
Actor exposes a query to retrieve the stored thumbnail blob and metadata by ID
Actor exposes a delete function to remove a stored thumbnail by ID
Only one thumbnail is active at a time (uploading a new one replaces the previous)

requirements.text: Build a single-page Thumbnail PNG Uploader UI that allows the user to select or drag-and-drop one PNG file at a time, shows a live preview of the selected image before upload, validates that the file is PNG-only with a clear error message for invalid types, and uploads the file to the backend on confirmation.

quotes: Single PNG upload with file picker and drag-and-drop support
Live preview of the selected thumbnail before confirming
PNG-only validation with clear error messages

acceptanceCriteria: A file picker button and a drag-and-drop zone are both available for selecting a file
Only PNG files are accepted; selecting any other file type shows a clear error message
After selecting a valid PNG, a live preview of the image is displayed before upload
An upload/confirm button triggers the upload to the backend
A success state is shown after a successful upload, displaying the uploaded thumbnail
A delete/replace button allows the user to remove the current thumbnail and upload a new one
Only one thumbnail can be active at a time

requirements.text: Apply a clean, minimal visual theme to the uploader app: light neutral background, generous whitespace, subtle rounded upload zone with dashed border, smooth drag-over highlight state, and readable sans-serif typography. Enforce the theme consistently across all UI states (idle, drag-over, preview, uploading, success, error).

quotes: Clean, minimal UI focused on the upload experience

acceptanceCriteria: Upload zone has a dashed border and visually highlights on drag-over
All states (idle, drag-over, preview, uploading, success, error) have distinct, consistent visual treatments
Typography is clean and readable with adequate contrast
Layout is centered and uncluttered on both desktop and mobile

constraints: Only PNG files may be uploaded; all other formats must be rejected client-side before any backend call
Only one thumbnail can be stored/active at a time
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Support for image formats other than PNG
User authentication or access control for uploads
Cloud storage or external CDN integration
